visual: (Part 1 — Creation): Data Tables (Numeric Display). "Plants in the Garden" — Tomatoes=60, Peppers=35, Carrots=45, Beans=20. Vertical layout.
visual_2: (Part 1 — Creation): Bar Graphs (Mode 2: Creating). Horizontal. Scale of 10, axis 0–70. NO bars pre-filled. Ghost gridlines at 5s visible. Snap-to-5 enabled.
guide: "Use the data table to complete the graph."
student_action: Set all four bars: Tomatoes=60, Peppers=35, Carrots=45, Beans=20
on_complete: Graph displays with all bars. **Data Table hides** (problem-solving uses graph only).
visual_3: (Part 2 — Problem-solving): Bar Graphs (Mode 2: Creating). Same graph. Peppers and Carrots highlighted. Data Table hidden.
prompt_2: (Part 2) "How many plants IN ALL for Peppers and Carrots?"
remediation: (Light) "Find Peppers and Carrots on your graph. Add them together."
